gate_output_contract: binary 0/1; chatter = count of 0->1 transitions at threshold 0.5

statistical_tests.rule: Shapiro-Wilk on paired differences: if p >= 0.05 use ttest_rel, else wilcoxon. Count metrics always wilcoxon. alpha=0.05, one-sided.
statistical_tests.pairing: same seed, same morphology, different controller
